notes: Active - shows a 'Checking site... Please standby' toast, then runs DOM/cookie/HTML heuristics plus up to 6 fetch/HEAD requests to determine if the site runs WordPress. Displays results in a V9 modal (id: __wpDetectModal) titled 'WordPress Detection' with verdict (LIKELY/POSSIBLY/UNLIKELY WordPress) and a checklist, plus 'List User Accounts' button. hatless1der.com is a known WordPress site. Longer wait_ms allows async fetch checks to complete.
